ad.name: Hidden Food Trigger Reveal
ad.hook_line: POV: you find out the food you eat EVERY DAY is causing your bloating

storyboard: 0-3s  → HOOK: Kitchen table, reading results on phone, casual → frozen shock
3-6s  → BODY: Processing face, looking more toward camera, 'are you serious?'
6-10s → PROOF: Test kit on counter + she picks it up
10-13s → RESULT: Relief face, quiet knowing smile
13-15s → CTA: Product in frame with her, text overlay

shots.name: Reading Results — Casual
shots.what_this_is: Frame A. She's at kitchen table casually reading phone. Neutral expression
shots.text_overlay: POV: you find out the food you eat EVERY DAY is causing your bloating

prompt.reference_images: Attached: Bea avatar reference for face identity
prompt.subject: Same woman from avatar reference. KEY IDENTITY MARKERS: white/grey streak left temple, chin scar, asymmetric brows. Messy bun, no makeup, faded black v-neck tee. MATCH ATTACHED REFERENCE
prompt.expression: Casual reading face. Neutral-curious. Looking down and to the right (at a phone screen she's holding below frame). Relaxed, not expecting anything surprising. One hand near a coffee mug on table
prompt.scene: Kitchen table. Morning. She's sitting, looking down at something (phone implied but NOT visible). Coffee mug on table. Simple home kitchen background

camera.framing: Head, shoulders, upper chest. Selfie distance. 9:16 vertical

prompt.lighting: Kitchen morning light, warm. Window light from left

shots.output_becomes: C001-01.jpg → Use as Frame A reference for C001-02

shots.name: Reading Results — Frozen Shock
shots.what_this_is: Frame B. Same scene, expression shifts to quiet shock. Something in the results caught her off guard

prompt.reference_images: Attached: Frame A (C001-01). This is the ONLY reference. Generate Frame B from this
prompt.instruction: Starting from attached Frame A, generate Frame B. ONLY the expression changes. Everything else identical
prompt.expression_change: Eyes 15% wider. Right brow lifts higher than left (her natural asymmetry). Lips part 3-4mm. Jaw drops 2mm. Frozen for 0.3 seconds of surprise. This is QUIET shock — not theatrical, not hands-over-mouth. Just... processing. The 'wait, what?' micro-moment. Expression at 30% intensity
prompt.what_stays_same: Same kitchen, same table, same coffee mug, same clothes, same lighting, same framing, same gaze direction

shots.output_becomes: C001-02.jpg → Veo animate C001-01 + C001-02 for hook clip

shots.name: Processing Face — Direct Address
shots.what_this_is: She's now looking more toward camera. 'Are you serious?' mixed disbelief and realization
shots.text_overlay: the F.A.S.T. panel tests 88 foods across 4 immune pathways

prompt.reference_images: Attached: Bea avatar reference for face identity
prompt.subject: Same woman. MATCH ATTACHED REFERENCE. Same kitchen setting but slightly different angle — she's now looking more toward camera
prompt.expression: Processing. Brow slightly furrowed, eyes narrowed (studying/thinking). Mouth closed, pressed together. Head tilts slightly to one side. 'Let me understand this' face. Slight head shake energy. Not angry — just processing information. Expression at 30%

camera.framing: Head and shoulders. Closer than C001-01. She's leaned forward slightly. 9:16 vertical

shots.name: Product on Counter — Morning Context
shots.what_this_is: The test kit box on kitchen counter next to coffee mug. Lifestyle product shot
shots.text_overlay: catches delayed reactions other tests miss

prompt.reference_images: Attached: Combo test kit product image. Must match exactly
prompt.shot_type: PRODUCT LIFESTYLE. The test kit box sitting on kitchen counter. No face. Morning context
prompt.product_instructions: White box, navy INFINITE branding, geometric logo — MATCH ATTACHED REFERENCE. Sitting on counter next to coffee mug and phone (phone face-down). Slightly angled, natural placement. Box looks slightly lived-with — it's been sitting on her counter for a few days
prompt.lighting: Warm kitchen morning light. Product branding readable

shots.name: Picking Up the Kit
shots.what_this_is: Her hands picking up/holding the test kit. Transition from counter to in-hand

prompt.reference_images: Attached: (1) Bea reference for skin/hand consistency, (2) Product reference
prompt.shot_type: HANDS + PRODUCT. Her hands holding the test kit box. Face partially visible at top of frame (chin, mouth area). Casual grip
prompt.hands: Medium brown skin, golden undertones. Black hair tie on right wrist. Short unpolished nails. Fingers wrap around short edge of box
prompt.product_instructions: Box MATCHES ATTACHED REFERENCE. She's holding it casually — just picked it up from the counter. Not displaying it

camera.framing: Close-up hands + product. Lower face visible at top edge. 9:16 vertical

shots.name: Relief Face — Finally Answers
shots.what_this_is: Her face showing quiet relief. The knowing half-smile. 'Well, at least now I know'
shots.text_overlay: results in 3-5 days + free dietitian consultation

prompt.subject: Same woman. MATCH ATTACHED REFERENCE. Kitchen setting
prompt.expression: Quiet relief. Asymmetric half-smile — right side lifts slightly more. Eyes softer, warmer. Eye crinkle barely visible. Shoulders visibly dropped from tension. A single slow exhale energy. 'Finally, answers' without saying it. Expression at 30% — subtle, not a grin

camera.framing: Head and shoulders. Direct but 2 degrees off camera. Warm. 9:16 vertical

prompt.lighting: Warm kitchen light. Slightly more flattering than earlier shots — she's in a better light now (metaphorically and literally)

shots.name: CTA — Product + Her
shots.what_this_is: She's in frame with the product. Taps or gestures at it. Text does the selling
shots.text_overlay: Link in bio → covered by most insurance plans

prompt.subject: Same woman holding test kit box at chest level. Looking at camera with warm, confident, 'you should try this' energy. NOT selling — recommending
prompt.product_instructions: Box MATCHES ATTACHED REFERENCE. Held at mid-chest, branding facing camera. Natural hold, not product placement
prompt.expression: Warm confidence. Gentle half-smile. Direct gaze (still 2 degrees off). 'This changed things for me' energy without words

camera.framing: Head, shoulders, and product visible at chest level. 9:16 vertical

generations_needed: C001-01: Avatar ref → kitchen reading casual
C001-02: C001-01 output → expression shift (Frame B shock)
C001-04: Product ref → product on counter lifestyle
C001-05: Avatar ref + Product ref → hands holding kit
C001-07: Avatar ref + Product ref → her + product CTA
veo_animations: C001-01 + C001-02 → 2.5s clip (casual reading → frozen shock)
